feed.title: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, Claude Skills Hub, and Glama (blog + release notes)

entry.title: knowledge-foundry
entry.content: Governed pipeline for building trusted, licensed, versioned, RAG-ready domain corpora, driven by the deterministic kf CLI. Install the CLI with: npm install -g @knowledge-foundry/cli

entry.title: swiss-cheese
entry.content: No single defense layer is perfect — stack enough imperfect ones that the holes never align. This plugin initializes Swiss Cheese defense layers in your repository, runs a token-frugal multi-agent code review from one shared diff, works autonomously in a loop applying the layers, guides you through building custom layers, audits docs/ADRs/review style, and discovers where task knowledge lives (Jira, Redmine, MCP servers).

entry.title: gm-car-ac-revenue-os
entry.content: A free-first AI revenue operating system for GM Car A/C Service: A/C, general servicing, car electricals, competitors, ads, local SEO, WhatsApp sales, fleet outreach, and training growth.

entry.title: pipecat-dev
entry.content: Development workflow skills for contributing to the Pipecat project

entry.title: revenue-skills-marketplace
entry.content: A marketplace-style bundle of revenue skills for offers, sales, ads, campaigns, social media, outreach, and landing pages.

entry.title: claude-code-stint
entry.content: Stint plugin for Claude Code - Track Claude Code CLI and Desktop coding activity in Stint

entry.title: obsidian-tools
entry.content: Obsidian vault CLI skill — vault-native search, create, tasks, daily notes, and properties via the Obsidian CLI

entry.title: pm-craft
entry.content: PM craft skills: systems thinking, lean canvas, walkthroughs, explainers, mental models, stress-testing and debate

entry.title: swe-docs
entry.content: Generate a complete, traceable engineering documentation suite from a project_overview.md file. Bundles two skills: project-overview (interviews you to build the overview) and project-docs (produces PRD, SRS, Contract & Invariants, Transition, Architecture, API Spec, and Visual Identity in a dependency-ordered chain).

entry.title: harness-portable
entry.content: Skill portabili cloud-safe dell'AI Harness: bibtex-conventions, major-revision-discipline, scientific-writing, diagram-design. Pensate per sessioni Claude Code on the web (VM Anthropic), zero dipendenze da ds4/Ollama/texlive/MCP locali.

entry.title: into-the-unknown
entry.content: Discover your unknowns before, during, and after implementation — blindspot passes, brainstorms, interviews, references, implementation plans/notes, pitches, and quizzes. Based on Thariq's "A Field Guide to Fable: Finding Your Unknowns".

entry.title: kordoc
entry.content: Parse, generate, fill, patch, compare, validate, and render Korean official documents (HWP 3.x/5.x, HWPX, HWPML, PDF, DOCX, XLS/XLSX) in Claude — 공문서 프리셋 생성, 서식 보존 빈칸 채우기, 라운드트립 패치, 조판 SVG 렌더. Powered by the kordoc npm CLI/MCP — no Hancom Office required.

entry.title: token-optimizer
entry.content: Cuts token consumption in coding sessions by rewriting verbose commands, compressing tool output, reminding about /compact, and routing simple tasks to cheap Haiku subagents.

entry.title: vibing-nvim
entry.content: Neovim MCP tools, skills, and subagents for vibing.nvim — lets Claude Code read/edit buffers, drive LSP, and manage windows in a running Neovim instance.

entry.title: multi-code-review
entry.content: Consensus code review by independent models: Claude + OpenAI Codex in parallel, with optional Google Antigravity (Gemini) as a third reviewer. Findings are cross-verified and merged into one report.

entry.title: agentflow
entry.content: Tech-stack-agnostic dev workflow for a single GitHub repo: a PO/DEV/QC agent team coordinated via GitHub issues + flow:* labels and a required GitHub Projects v2 board, with parallel /start terminals that claim work via issue assignee. Ships 4 core skills (setup-agentflow, project-board-protocol, git-flow-working, figma-design) and lets each project add role-prefixed skills (dev-*, qc-*, po-*). Fully specified connections (token + MCP server) for GitHub, GitHub Projects, and Figma, secure .env secret management, and a single-source-of-truth config describing dynamic project surfaces (any mix of backend/frontend/mobile/…).

entry.title: skill-manager
entry.content: Three-tier activation manager for agent assets (skills, subagents, commands, workflows): keep a large library dormant at zero context cost and activate only what each project needs, via a symlink/junction/tracked-copy ladder with drift detection and repair.

entry.title: plan-review
entry.content: Closed-loop plan-review gate on ExitPlanMode: Codex unknowns audit + agentic-investigation gate, with the /investigate-plan adapter (drives the Hermes investigator in the hermes container) and /waive-investigation.

entry.title: armada
entry.content: Autonomous Recursive Multi-Agent Development Assembler — a fleet of Claude Code skills that watch for GitHub issues and drive them to a reviewed, verified, merge-ready PR.

entry.title: skidl
entry.content: Design electronic schematics and PCB layouts using SKiDL — create circuits with Python code, validate designs, and export to KiCad.

entry.title: gabriel-skills
entry.content: Gabriel's skill collection — artifact generation, commit helpers, and more.

entry.title: imagine-mcp
entry.content: Image/video understanding & generation across Gemini, OpenAI, Grok

entry.title: cc-native
entry.content: Keep Claude Code feature-aware against weekly releases: feature-guide skill, edit-time reminder + lint + audit for .claude/ artifacts.

entry.title: workflow-skills
entry.content: Claude Code skills for general engineering workflows: collaborative PR review, durable multi-step planning, auditable quantitative analysis pipelines with independent fact-checking, and a repo-native task loop for capturing and processing follow-up work.

entry.title: feature-status-tracker
entry.content: Turns a Markdown feature table — or a raw feature list — into an autonomous dev pipeline: clarify each feature, then develop one branch + one PR per feature until the table is done. Works in English or French.

entry.title: factory
entry.content: Autonomous coding pipeline: converts GitHub PRD issues into merged pull requests with quality-first review gates

entry.title: onecli
entry.content: Connect AI agents to external APIs with zero credential management. OneCLI gateway injects stored credentials into outbound requests automatically.

entry.title: context-mode
entry.content: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entry.title: perso-dubbing
entry.content: Auto-dub videos into other languages with lip-sync via the Perso AI Dubbing API, plus voice/background audio separation. Handles single files, folders, URLs, oversized/long media (auto split & merge), multi-language output, and resume.

entry.title: chitta-bridge
entry.content: Multi-agent discussion sessions with OpenCode, Codex, and local GPU models

entry.title: makepad-skills
entry.content: Comprehensive Makepad UI framework assistant with auto-routing, widget patterns, shaders, animations, and production-ready Robius patterns from Robrix/Moly codebases

entry.title: polygram
entry.content: Telegram integration for Claude Code that preserves the OpenClaw per-chat session model. Migration target for OpenClaw users. Multi-bot, multi-chat, per-topic isolation; SQLite transcripts; inline-keyboard approvals. Bundles /polygram:status|logs|pair-code|approvals admin commands plus history (transcript queries) and polygram-send (out-of-turn IPC sends with file-upload validation) skills.

entry.title: loreconvo
entry.content: Vault your Claude conversations. Captures session decisions, artifacts, and context across Code, Cowork, and Chat. Organizes memory by project, skill, and persona. Never re-explain yourself again.

entry.title: markdown-vault-mcp
entry.content: MCP server for markdown vaults: FTS5 + semantic search, link graph, write/edit/git.

entry.title: arboretum
entry.content: Choreography for AI-assisted software development. Defers heavy lifting to specialists like superpowers; provides governance, workflows, and templates that produce maintainable projects.

entry.title: better-notion-mcp
entry.content: Markdown-first Notion API integration — 8 composite tools, ~95% coverage

entry.title: home-assistant-manager
entry.content: Expert-level Home Assistant configuration management: deploy workflows, SSH/hass-cli access, automation verification, and Lovelace dashboard development

entry.title: metareview
entry.content: Go-based metaswarm-compatible internal review harness for plans, specs, decompositions, task-done code review, acceptance evidence, PR readiness, and post-merge learning. Packaged releases use bin/metareview; source checkout mode requires Go 1.22+.

entry.title: gobbler
entry.content: Convert YouTube videos, web pages, documents, and audio to markdown. Control browsers via extension for NotebookLM, ChatGPT, Claude.ai, and Gemini.

entry.title: reviewable-html-workbench
entry.content: Generate reviewable HTML documents, serve previews, collect comments, and feed review outcomes back into agent workflows.

entry.title: mochi
entry.content: Make a Clawd Mochi desk companion react to your Claude Code sessions — eye expressions on hook events, 5-hour limit bar from the status line.

entry.title: splitwise-mcp
entry.content: MCP server for Splitwise — natural-language expense and group management via the Splitwise API

entry.title: textus
entry.content: Durable, multi-writer repo memory. Auto-orients each session with `textus boot`.

entry.title: yutori
entry.content: Web monitoring (Scouts), deep research, and browser automation

entry.title: creditkarma-mcp
entry.content: MCP server for Credit Karma — natural-language access to your transactions, spending, and accounts

entry.title: darkmatter-skills
entry.content: Darkmatter's team-wide shared skills catalog, auto-discovered from skills/.

entry.title: skills-marketplace
entry.content: A marketplace of Claude Agent Skills for various tasks

entry.title: api-expert
entry.content: Expert API design, review, debugging, optimization, security auditing, spec generation, migration, and deprecation. Runs on the session model — always the strongest available Claude. Backed by embedded reference files covering architecture patterns, schema design, authentication, authorization, security hardening, client access, performance, observability, testing, inter-service communication, and API lifecycle, plus a canonical OWASP API Top 10 2023 checklist. Optionally grounds itself further with goodmem (memory) and serena (semantic code navigation) MCP servers if configured — works standalone from the embedded references if not. Handles REST/GraphQL/gRPC/tRPC/Connect, OAuth 2.1/OIDC, multi-tenancy, RFC 9457 errors, rate limiting, OTel observability, and the full API lifecycle from spec to sunset.

entry.title: inkbox
entry.content: Inkbox email and phone SDK skills for Claude Code.

entry.title: loop-engineer
entry.content: Design, launch, verify, repair, and improve agent loops. A Claude-Code-native architect+operator for long-running, verifiable, self-improving agentic-coding systems.

entry.title: temporal-reasoning
entry.content: Temporal Reasoning gives AI coding agents bi-temporal graph memory: query any past state, traverse live dependency graphs, and correlate architectural decisions with structural change — all with deterministic Datalog, no fuzzy retrieval.

entry.title: create-cmp
entry.content: Scaffold AND maintain production-ready Kotlin/Compose Multiplatform apps (Android + iOS) — conversational interview, toolchain auto-bootstrap, proven-green version-set upgrades, a doctor that heals any KMP project, an AI-native Compose inspector (structured JSON, no screenshots), and an Appium test harness. Wraps the same deterministic engine as `npx create-cmp-cli` (published npm name; installs the `create-cmp` command).

entry.title: cc-soul
entry.content: Persistent memory and code intelligence for Claude Code. Claude learns your preferences, remembers your codebase, anticipates your needs, and gets smarter over time. 150+ tools. Local-first. Zero configuration.

entry.title: eai-gofer
entry.content: Gofer core pipeline: /0_gofer_start through /6_gofer_validate, plus optional helper commands.

entry.title: agent-decision-record
entry.content: Structured decision-making for AI coding agents. Creates auditable Agent Decision Records (AgDR) when technical choices are made — selecting libraries, patterns, or architecture.

entry.title: plastic
entry.content: Intent-driven state management for AI coding sessions. Neuroplasticity for your codebase.

entry.title: wholework
entry.content: GitHub issue-driven Claude Code skills for agentic work

entry.title: nexus-agents
entry.content: Intelligent orchestration platform for AI coding tools — routes tasks to the best model, learns from outcomes, and enforces quality through multi-model consensus. 46 MCP tools for agent management, research, memory, consensus voting, codebase intelligence, and a full dev pipeline.

entry.title: gtm-icp
entry.content: GTM-as-code: a backend-free Claude plugin that finds B2B accounts matching your ICP, then enriches, classifies and scores them into a prioritized target list for outreach — grounded on your own corpus, bring your own keys.

entry.title: miller
entry.content: Local SQLite-backed code intelligence, content search, and workspace freshness for coding agents.

entry.title: co-dev
entry.content: Cloud Officer development workflow tools for PR management, issue tracking, code quality, cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP), deployment (Heroku), payments (PayPal), observability (New Relic), design (Figma), app stores (App Store Connect, Google Play), and database management

entry.title: claude-config
entry.content: Linlin's curated Claude Code configuration: workflow rules, skills, hooks, plugin recommendations, tooling preferences, and project templates. Install once, then run /init-claude-config in any new project to scaffold it with the relevant subset.

entry.title: hyperflow
entry.content: Fourteen specialized slash commands turn one Claude session into a structured multi-agent engineering pipeline. Decision agents orchestrate, triage, and review; workers execute in parallel — every agent runs on your current session model, every step is a Worker → Reviewer pair, and every non-trivial phase fans into sub-phases with their own reviewers. Auto-routing is on by default — say 'audit the diff', 'debug this test', 'large migration', or 'run a workflow' and the orchestrator routes to the right skill without the /hyperflow:* prefix. /hyperflow:workflow uses Claude Code dynamic workflows for big tasks and a portable Codex/OpenCode adapter where native workflows are unavailable; /hyperflow:plan rewrites a rough prompt into a high-quality one, asks the questions a senior engineer would, and decomposes the approach into a batched task graph; /hyperflow:dispatch fans out persona-stitched workers under per-batch and final-integration review; /hyperflow:design establishes a domain-grounded design system, researches real-world prior art, and renders it slop-free under the local taste skills. 15 composable personas, 6 adaptive flow profiles, and persistent project memory compound across sessions. Works across Codex App/CLI, Claude Code, OpenCode, Antigravity, and Cursor.

entry.title: mor
entry.content: AI-accessible knowledge you actually own — plain markdown on your disk

entry.title: oci-administrator
entry.content: Safe OCI engineering for Claude Code: administration, storage, disaster recovery, Bastion, landing zones, Terraform, platform delivery, and security evidence.

entry.title: commonplace
entry.content: LLM-maintained knowledge base for Obsidian vaults. Auto-triggers on paper sharing, vault health queries, concept compilation, research questions, and domain management.

entry.title: cc-websearch
entry.content: DDG-powered WebSearch and WebFetch replacement for Claude Code

entry.title: claude-tdd-pro
entry.content: Drop-in plugin that elevates any codebase to Google's published engineering standards (eng-practices, JS/TS style, Python style). /analyze produces a citable compliance report; /remediate executes a small-CL plan that ratchets the codebase toward the bar; every greenfield prompt is gated by the same RUBRIC.yaml. Hardened against prompt-injection, secret-leakage, and protected-branch commits. Auto-disclosure via Assisted-by: trailer.

entry.title: interject
entry.content: Ambient discovery and research engine. Continuously scans arXiv, Hacker News, GitHub, and Anthropic docs for new capabilities, workflows, and tools relevant to your engineering ecosystem. Creates beads with briefings and draft plans based on a learned recommendation model.

entry.title: homeclaw
entry.content: HomeKit smart home control via MCP - control lights, locks, thermostats, and scenes

entry.title: skill-provenance
entry.content: Portable provenance, integrity, and drift control for agent skills across sessions, surfaces, and platforms

entry.title: ai-devkit
entry.content: Make AI coding agents follow a repeatable engineering workflow with memory, verification, skills, and multi-agent setup

entry.title: codebrief-capture
entry.content: Codebrief intent capture — distills developer intent locally at session end, after a git push, or after a PR is created, and sends only derived annotations (never code) to your Codebrief workspace.

entry.title: esequiel378-skills
entry.content: esequiel378-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: ivuorinen-skills
entry.content: Hostile audit skills for Claude Code: adversarial code review, architecture detection and auditing, and documentation verification.

entry.title: emdx
entry.content: Knowledge base skills for Claude Code. Save research, maintain session memory, and keep knowledge current across conversations.

entry.title: the-loop
entry.content: An opinionated product-development-lifecycle harness that lets coding agents deliver work items end-to-end, with minimal human intervention, through a predictable loop of plan, execute, self-review, critic-review and escalate.

entry.title: Wachines-Plugin-Ironman
entry.content: Software factory toolkit for Claude Code: Postgres/Supabase & React/Next best practices, SQL-migration & security reviewers, docs architect, RPC-API contract, functional front QA, and the wachi-fabrica orchestrator — plus db/frontend/security subagents. Project-agnostic.

entry.title: claude-witness
entry.content: A quiet observer that tracks how you grow and change as you work — your thinking, workstyle, habits, and the patterns you climb out of. Coach-oriented, not clone. Person-centric growth archive with pluggable per-repo lenses.

entry.title: pua
entry.content: Opt-in productivity coaching for Claude Code. Use for explicit PUA/try-harder requests, user frustration after repeated failures, requests to retry or change approach, passive/low-quality work complaints, completion checks, evidence requests, test/verification reminders, and Ding-style workplace process cues. Normal calm first-attempt requests are left alone.

entry.title: episteme
entry.content: The epistemic-posture layer for AI coding agents. Ships the Reasoning Surface protocol, named failure-mode counters, operator profile schema, and workflow loop as Claude Code skills, agents, and hooks. Posture first. Kernel outlives the tooling.

entry.title: skill-inject
entry.content: Local, model-agnostic automatic skill injection: embeds the prompt on CPU, ranks it against your skill descriptions, and injects the matching skill only when one actually fits — via UserPromptSubmit/PostToolUse/SessionStart hooks. No API call, nothing leaves your machine.

entry.title: cicd-expert
entry.content: Expert CI/CD pipeline architect, reviewer, optimizer, debugger, and security auditor, running on the session model (always the strongest available Claude) and backed by a self-contained embedded knowledge base covering GitHub Actions, GitLab CI/CD, Jenkins, Buildkite, Tekton, and Kubernetes-native stacks. Self-hosted runner fleet design, supply chain security (SLSA/Sigstore/SBOMs), progressive delivery, DORA metrics, and cross-platform migration.

entry.title: gsd-core
entry.content: GSD Core is a meta-prompting, context engineering, and spec-driven development system for AI coding agents.

entry.title: ai-employee-builder
entry.content: Public AI Employee Builder shell: auto-routing skill stubs + proactive hooks that connect buyers to the gated AIEB MCP server.

entry.title: rpm
entry.content: Relentless Project Manager. Prevents drift and keeps you on task across LLM-assisted development sessions.

entry.title: gemini-manager
entry.content: Enables Claude Code to manage Gemini CLI as an intern. Claude acts as manager/architect while Gemini does all coding work.

entry.title: lsp-refactor
entry.content: Project-wide rename, file-move-with-importer-updates, and move-symbol via a real language server. Use this whenever a refactor touches more than one file — Claude Code's built-in LSP tool is READ-ONLY and cannot rename, move files, or move symbols. A text-only edit silently misses re-exports, aliased and type-only imports, and {@link} references; this plugin drives the LSP to catch every one.

entry.title: centauri
entry.content: A deep harness and semantic layer for LLM assistants, installable on five surfaces: Claude Code (this plugin), Claude.ai (the same skill, uploaded), any other CLI (HARNESS.md), ChatGPT and Gemini (generated instruction packs). Substantive tasks run through an orchestrator that delegates, adversarially verifies, keeps rolling summaries, and persists learnings into a semantic layer that reloads every session.

entry.title: doc-wiki
entry.content: Documentation wiki generator and maintainer for Claude Code. Atlas (full-codebase docs with ER diagrams and a cross-service map), ingest, query, lint — all driven by the doc-wiki skill and 8 namespaced slash commands.

entry.title: agents
entry.content: Skills do fazer.ai agents: onboarding (subir do zero num VPS), desenvolvimento (mexer no código) e operação (debugar em produção).

entry.title: david-skills
entry.content: david-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: bean
entry.content: Local hybrid search over your knowledge base — 10 built-in connectors (Slack, Google Drive, GitHub, Confluence, Jira, Zendesk, Salesforce, HubSpot, Microsoft 365, Discord) plus local files (incl. PDF), and a plugin system for authoring your own. /bean <question>, /bean sync, /bean init. No server: your credentials, Lance + DuckDB under ~/.bean.

entry.title: beagle
entry.content: Code review skills and verification workflows for Python, Go, React, and AI frameworks

entry.title: anton-core
entry.content: Personal AI assistant — knowledge, tasks, code graph, session intelligence

entry.title: yodogawa
entry.content: AIネイティブIDE向け仕様駆動開発スキル集

entry.title: sam-gov
entry.content: SAM.gov + USAspending + Federal Register + eCFR + Grants.gov for Claude — 36 keyless tools wrapped as MCP server + Skill workflow guide.

entry.title: housekeeping
entry.content: Audit a GitHub repo's health — branch protection, CI, dependabot, secret scanning, lockfiles, README, license — and drive confirm-first fixes.

entry.title: coding
entry.content: Coding guidelines, code review commands, and quality agents for Go and Python development

entry.title: relay
entry.content: Monitors context usage live and auto-writes a structured handoff document at 90% so your work survives compaction and resumes in any AI agent.

entry.title: sdd-engineering-team
entry.content: Spec-Driven Development engineering team: an orchestrator plus seven specialist personas (product, project, full-stack engineer, quality engineer, QA analyst, debugger, UX designer) and an eleven-agent speckit generation pipeline. Ships with reusable skills, MCP server config, dashboard scripts, and runtime guardrail hooks.

entry.title: claude-skills
entry.content: Personal collection of Claude Code skills and subagents.

entry.title: Automated Video Generator
entry.content: Transform text scripts into professional videos with AI voiceovers, stock footage, and Remotion rendering. Advanced features include direct filesystem access, environment management, and whitelisted command execution.

entry.title: intermonk
entry.content: Hegelian dialectic reasoning — Electric Monk subagents for structured contradiction analysis and synthesis

entry.title: claude-skills-templates
entry.content: Work lifecycle pipeline, doc contract enforcement, and skill authoring workbench for Claude Code

entry.title: farmhand
entry.content: Operate a farm or homestead's farmOS instance directly from Claude Code (read + gated writes) with a local-first environment data server, plus skills for orchard, blueberries, dairy goats, meat sheep, poultry, pastures, and working stockdogs.

entry.title: citevahti
entry.content: CiteVahti — citation integrity for manuscripts. Human-first blinded claim verification with PubMed, decision-gated Zotero write-back, and a hash-chained audit trail; plus an AI-assisted drafting skill that writes only from verified claims.

entry.title: agent-team-pack
entry.content: サブスク枠内でAIエージェントチームを運用する基盤。永続記憶＋監視ダッシュボード＋セッション管理。すべてLLMを呼ばない＝追加課金ゼロ。

entry.title: design-ai
entry.content: Senior product designer for any AI coding agent. 20 skills, 17 commands, 4 review agents covering UI/UX, website improvement, design systems, motion, illustration, print, video, game UI, conversational, and spatial design. Korean market depth.

entry.title: keel
entry.content: Foundation-first autonomous build workflow for Claude Code: spec the foundation, build feature-by-feature, gate every milestone with independent verification and a commit-pinned record. Stack-neutral — each project derives its own verification profile.

entry.title: mcp-dev
entry.content: MCP development skills for TypeScript SDK v2

entry.title: opys
entry.content: Operate the opys file-based feature inventory and work items — track what a project does and its in-flight changes. Requires the `opys` CLI (cargo install opys).

entry.title: noah-8719
entry.content: 소스코드 보안 분석 플러그인. SAST(정적 분석 + 동적 테스트 + 통합 보고서) 스킬 제공.

entry.title: bps-compliance
entry.content: Building Performance Standards compliance — Local Law 97 NYC penalty calculator, BEPS ordinance tracking, compliance deadline alerts, and fine mitigation strategies across US/Canada/EU jurisdictions.

entry.title: devflow
entry.content: Make agentic coding work on real codebases: DevFlow takes a one-line request to a complete, tested, reviewed, documented PR that's ready for your final review, and improves itself weekly. Includes /devflow:implement (4-phase orchestrator), /devflow:review and /devflow:review-and-fix (a verification-checklist review engine that audits its own approval), the /devflow:docs suite, /devflow:create-issue, plus the self-improving retrospective loop (/devflow:retrospective per-PR + /devflow:retrospective-audit weekly).

entry.title: folio
entry.content: folio Layer 0 META FRAMEWORK — universal architecture spec-writing rules + Claude Code plugin harness. minimal scope = ADR-0003/0007: 1 skill + 6 hook + 7 script + 1 CLI.

entry.title: synth-mcp-auto-dev
entry.content: Research synthesis MCP server — load research collections, query items, and generate structured design specs

entry.title: manus-dispatch
entry.content: Dispatch long-running research tasks to the Manus AI agent platform from Claude Code via slash command. On-demand polling plus SessionStart hook that surfaces newly-completed tasks on the next session, optional Obsidian filing, explicit-invocation cost gating.

entry.title: growmax-skills
entry.content: Growmax team Claude Code skills and workflows. Auto-discovers skills/, commands/, agents/, and hooks/. Ships: github-repo-analyzer (skill); learn-app + product-manager (per-repo product notebook — /learn-app builds and maintains docs/product/ from a code census + optional read-only walk, with an async question ledger the human answers in-file; the product-manager agent answers questions and writes specs from the notebook with per-claim provenance, never inventing product truth); feature-review (end-of-development multi-agent review — TDD compliance, contextual-creation UX, 10k-row scalability + security sweep, advisory architecture ideas — one verified scorecard with a per-finding HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW confidence report, a run ledger, and a periodic-calibration process for improving precision over time); app-cartograph (map a live app into durable context — navigation + business flows + knowledge graph — via a code-seeded frontier and a write-safe human-in-the-loop walk; runs upstream of E2E); e2e-flow (gated multi-agent E2E test-generation for a single flow, web + api); and e2e-map + e2e-batch (whole-app flow census → one approval → autonomous suite generation).

entry.title: unblink
entry.content: Pure-Go browser for AI: fetch pages, optionally render JS (no Chromium), get clean token-budgeted Markdown over MCP.

entry.title: ralph-wiggum-plugin
entry.content: CLI-agnostic Ralph autonomous development loop with token tracking, context rotation, gutter detection, and Spec Kit support. Drives either the Claude Code or cursor-agent CLI from a terminal-run shell loop.

entry.title: claude-wayfinder
entry.content: Helps Claude make deterministic, auditable choices about which agent and skills to use for a given task — replacing prose-scanning agent/skill selection with a typed scoring kernel.

entry.title: thruline
entry.content: Companion layer for AI coding agents: review queue delivered when the agent finishes, locked project decisions injected into every prompt. Requires the thruline binary on PATH (npm install -g thruline, or cargo install thruline).

entry.title: oats-skills
entry.content: Vue, Tauri, architecture, security, and MCP-debugging skills tailored to the oats desktop app.

entry.title: mind
entry.content: Claude Mind - Give Claude photographic memory in ONE portable file. Share, version, and transfer your Claude's brain.

entry.title: kaggle
entry.content: Independent, unofficial Kaggle.com workflow plugin: competition reports, dataset/model downloads, notebook execution, forums, writeups, submissions, and badge collection. Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Kaggle or Google.

entry.title: daimon
entry.content: Dream-briefing for AI coding agents: a cognitive checkpoint at session end, a 'while you were away' briefing at session start.

entry.title: agent-platform-skills
entry.content: Agent Platform Skills — lifecycle slash commands and cherry-pickable engineering skills (lite profile). Upgrade to full platform via npx when your team needs multi-IDE handoff.

entry.title: wenqu-mem
entry.content: 浙江大学工程管理硕士(MEM)学位论文一体化写作技能包(21 skill)：选题框架、文献防幻觉验证、写作、范文语体、去AI味/降AIGC、数据可视化、审稿与评审应对、LaTeX编译、Word导出、中期报告/答辩、答辩准备全流程。文曲星主功名文运；以 zjuthesis 为参照，方法论可迁移到其它中文学位论文。

entry.title: tamirs-superpowers
entry.content: 24 bundled skills, 6 specialist agents, smart worktree hooks, statusline, and MCP server stubs — plan, implement, review, debug, multi-agent setup, and audit code from one plugin.

entry.title: cc-skills-sdlc
entry.content: SDLC skills for Claude Code — architecture, planning, code quality, testing, review, and documentation.

entry.title: daily-token-poster
entry.content: Collect today's exact AI token usage and turn it into a shareable aitokenweight energy poster.

entry.title: stageset
entry.content: Teach Claude to author and operate StageSet resources for the stageset-controller — ordered, gated, multi-stage Flux delivery.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,850 supported skills.

entry.title: pulp
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for the Pulp audio framework — build, test, design, and ship audio plugins and apps

entry.title: chrest
entry.content: chrest — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: kratos
entry.content: Multi-agent orchestrator for features, research, and project insights

entry.title: cowork-to-code-bridge
entry.content: Connect Claude Cowork to Claude Code on your own computer (macOS or Linux). Cowork hands a task to a local Claude Code agent (and can run approved scripts too); the bridge is idempotent, streams progress, and is token-protected. Install with one command; it sets up a global Cowork skill so every session connects automatically — no /plugin, no setup inside Cowork.

entry.title: ml-odyssey-skills
entry.content: Skills migrated to ProjectMnemosyne for cross-project reuse

entry.title: kto-ma-racje-toolkit
entry.content: Marcin's personal Claude Code toolkit — bundles full-audit, lessons-update, TDD workflow, agent teams, search-tools-mastery, vibesec, subagent-driven-development. Includes auto-load-lessons SessionStart hook for the kto-ma-racje project.

entry.title: dinopowers
entry.content: Wrapper skills over superpowers:* that inject tea-rags signals (risk, ownership, churn, impact) into brainstorming, planning, execution, debugging, and review flows

entry.title: intermix
entry.content: Cross-repo matrix evaluation harness — run Skaffen against unfamiliar codebases, classify outcomes, track failure patterns.

entry.title: clawbio
entry.content: Bioinformatics-native AI agent skill library — pharmacogenomics, ancestry, scRNA-seq, metagenomics, variant annotation, genome comparison, and more. 24 skills with deterministic Python execution, reproducibility bundles, and local-first privacy.

entry.title: gdb-mcp
entry.content: Multi-session GDB and gdbserver debugging through MCP.

entry.title: coding-conventions
entry.content: On-demand, per-scope catalog of coding conventions; captures reusable patterns at checkpoints and scaffolds a project-local catalog in any repo.

entry.title: vision-mcp
entry.content: Vision-MCP: 视觉为主的桌面 GUI 操作 MCP server + Skill。Agent 可像人一样使用真实桌面应用（截图 → 视觉/AX 双轨识别 → click/type/key），支持持续修正 + 安全审批。

entry.title: rag-reviewer
entry.content: Agentic PR review: hybrid RAG + code graph via MCP, review skills for Claude Code

entry.title: redteam
entry.content: Adversarial agent-pair harness: one model writes code (plan → implement), a second model reviews it adversarially; the draft PR is the human checkpoint before merge (a single-model test-first TDD mode is also available).

entry.title: cc-plus
entry.content: A plugin that extends the capabilities of Claude Code by adding some useful and cool features and functionalities.

entry.title: tk
entry.content: SoT gap, route, reflect, learn, ui-diff와 grill/prototype/merge-conflict/handoff/to-prd/to-issues/arch-review를 제공하는 TigerKit Claude Code 플러그인입니다.

entry.content: Automated TeaRAGs installation wizard — Node.js, embedding providers, Qdrant, MCP configuration

entry.title: hyperclaude
entry.content: Push Claude Code beyond stock. Skills, agents, Codex collab — opinionated and personal.

entry.title: nervepack
entry.content: Personal AI context hub: skills (behavior), sources (curated technical refs), wiki (LLM-owned synthesis), and re-runnable Ubuntu setup. Karpathy-style LLM-wiki layer on top of a skill library.

entry.title: punchcard
entry.content: Drive AI coding agents through a punchcard board: a PM files tasks, an Engineer ships them as reviewed PRs with proof of work.

entry.content: Claude Code plugin that manages an Obsidian knowledge vault: capture, organize, index, and garden

entry.content: d-morrison's personal Claude Code skills (PR/review workflow, grading, reprexes, R-package helpers) and slash commands.

entry.title: aicoach-framework
entry.content: Multi-agent AI coach for endurance & strength athletes — runs entirely inside Claude Code.

entry.title: aegis
entry.content: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques

entry.title: axhub
entry.content: Korean-first Claude Code plugin for axhub. onboarding/bootstrap/deploy/import/development/diagnosis/clarity/update 8개 스킬이 ax-hub-cli v0.20.0+ 표면(hidden plugin-support 그룹 + 공개 deploy verify·diagnose·update)을 직접 호출해요. import 는 기존 로컬 앱 가져오기를, diagnosis 는 배포 실패 원인 요약을 담당하고, preview-confirm 배포와 verify 기반 성공 선언을 제공해요.

entry.title: pysheeet
entry.content: Comprehensive Python programming reference covering syntax, concurrency, networking, databases, ML/LLM development, and HPC

entry.title: forge
entry.content: A stage-by-stage workflow skill set (fg-*). A development loop that takes one task through a single cycle of ask·plan → execute → retro → done. Consists of fg-ask (inquiry/triage + grill-with-docs-style conversational grilling), fg-run (backlog selection menu · Run all, Dynamic Workflow execution), fg-learn (retro · doc promotion), and fg-done (done · seal · re-run guard), plus fg-map — an on-demand utility outside the loop that maps the codebase into .forge/codebase/ with parallel subagents so grilling reads a map instead of re-exploring the code (cuts context rot), and fg-quick — a lightweight lane outside the loop for trivial tasks that still grills lightly but skips formal artifacts (no ADR/plan/retro), records one line to .forge/quick/LOG.md, runs directly, and bails to fg-ask if the task turns out non-trivial, fg-status — a read-only reporter that surveys .forge/ and prints where every task stands plus the single next step you need (writes nothing, never auto-runs), fg-next — derives that same next step and runs it, announcing the step then invoking the skill rather than only reporting it (one-shot, except that a retro concluding without a re-grill recommendation chains straight into the seal — ADR-0026; fg-status reports, fg-next acts), with an 'all' mode (fg-next all) that drives backlog tasks to completion until empty, auto-progressing mechanical steps and halting at conversational walls, and fg-tdd — toggles persistent TDD mode in .forge/config.json (fg-ask then defaults to asking, fg-run runs test-first), and fg-eco — toggles eco mode in .forge/config.json (when on it activates loop-wide efficiency: fg-run caps its delegated workflow subagents at sonnet — lower only, the session model is untouched — and the embedded Eco laziness-first discipline in skills/fg-eco/ECO.md (code simplicity plus terse-communication output, caveman-derived) is injected into fg-run subagents, woven into fg-ask grilling as a YAGNI lens, and adopted by the current session — ADR-0014), and fg-loop — a goal-driven momentum loop with bounded replan: an initial conversational inquiry pins a machine-verifiable stop condition, an authorized fix-forward replan scope, and a replan cap (default 3 rounds) into .forge/loop.md, then it drives tasks unattended (run → UAT → auto-skip retro → seal, auto-selecting recommended defaults at every soft decision and asking the user nothing) until the checks pass, generating in-scope fix-forward tasks within the cap and halting only at the walls (unverifiable UAT, genuine fork, cap exhausted, no progress, check-tension oscillation, safety/irreversible action — ADR-0016). On a non-default git branch the whole forge state moves under .forge/branch/<branch>/ (git-tracked, namespaced so parallel branches never collide on .forge state — ADR-0011), and fg-merge — an outside-the-loop utility that, after you git merge a branch, integrates that branch's .forge/branch/<branch>/ into .forge/ (renumbering ADRs and rewriting cross-references, merging CONTEXT terms, folding done history, removing the branch folder; halts on genuine conflicts), and fg-cleanup — an outside-the-loop utility that retires stale or superseded ADRs to .forge/adr/retired/ on your approval, keeping the active decision set current without deleting the why (ADR-0012), and fg-statusline — an outside-the-loop setup utility that installs a bash fragment script reading .forge/ and wires it into settings.json so your terminal statusline shows the current loop progress (active task·stage, goal-loop indicator, or backlog count); since Claude Code allows only one statusLine it auto-wraps your existing one as an extra row rather than replacing it (ADR-0017), and fg-adversarial-review — an outside-the-loop utility that runs an optional adversarial review between fg-run and fg-learn: it assumes the result is wrong and fans out six lenses (failure points, hidden assumptions, misread requirements, security/performance/data-loss, unexpected misuse, weak decisions) as parallel workflow subagents, records findings to .forge/review.md, and on your approval turns fix-needed findings into a fix-forward plan to run again — optional, never a seal gate, always auto-skipped in unattended drives (ADR-0018), and fg-doctor — a read-only integrity health check (outside the loop) that surveys the .forge/ state contract and the docs/manifests and reports inconsistencies with a severity and an actionable fix hint each (orphaned run.md, broken/missing STATUS fields, slug-pairing mismatches, half-sealed done/, manifest version drift across the 3 places, README bilingual drift, skills missing from CLAUDE.md); it writes nothing and never auto-fixes — fg-status reports where you are, fg-doctor reports whether the state is healthy (ADR-0019), and fg-drop — an outside-the-loop utility that discards incomplete work you no longer want (a backlog plan, the active slot, an awaiting-retro task in executed/, or a halted goal loop): it lists the items with a per-item risk level (a checkbox dialog for ≤4, a numbered text list for ≥5), then a separate question to hard-delete (default, no trace) or archive to .forge/dropped/, behind a confirmation gate that warns already-run code is not reverted; it removes forge state only — never git, never your code — and a halted goal loop is dropped whole with its member tasks excluded from individual drop (ADR-0021), and fg-agents — an outside-the-loop utility that generates a project's domain agents by conversational grilling (outside any workflow): it derives the recurring, separable roles in the project and writes standard Claude Code subagent cards to .claude/agents/<role>.md, each description carrying a 'when to use' so fg-run can dispatch a matching role as agentType; the cards load at session start so they take effect only after a restart, and the whole path is graceful — a project with no domain agents runs exactly as before (ADR-0024). Use in contexts like 'start a new task', 'start with forge', 'let's work on this', 'refine the plan', 'map the codebase', 'forge quick', 'forge status', 'forge next', 'forge loop', 'forge tdd', 'forge eco', 'forge merge', 'forge cleanup', 'forge statusline', 'adversarial review', '적대적 리뷰', 'forge doctor', '무결성 검사', '상태 점검', 'forge drop', '작업 버리기', '계획 지워', 'forge agents', '도메인 에이전트 만들어', 'create project agents'.

entry.title: summer

entry.title: repo-forensics

entry.title: agent-reachout

entry.title: bridge
entry.content: Bridge — global task manager for Claude Code. Dependency-aware DAG, persists across repos/sessions.

entry.title: sota-skills
entry.content: State-of-the-art engineering skills (2026) for building and auditing software across 38 domains and languages — security, architecture, APIs, databases, cloud, Kubernetes, observability, testing, LLM engineering, UX writing, copywriting, and more — with a master router and BUILD/AUDIT modes (39 skills).

entry.title: juggle
entry.content: Multi-topic conversation orchestrator. Manage parallel conversation threads within a single Claude Code session — discuss one topic while background agents research or build for others.

entry.title: pdd
entry.content: PDD (Parity-Driven Development) — framework para refactor/rewrite/port de sistemas legados com paridade comportamental rastreável: evidência objetiva (score de confiança + harness de comparação), testes de caracterização, QA como portão de merge, PR-dossiê e painel de progresso.

entry.title: superlore
entry.content: Scaffold, author, deploy, release, and connect a superlore knowledge base — author once in MDX, humans get a clean visual site and agents get a first-class MCP over the same structured content. Say "Make me a docs using superlore" to start.

entry.title: rig
entry.content: rig — a quality-gated AI workbench for Claude Code. `/rig:rig "<task>"` classifies the task, shows why (a routing banner), composes the right harness, runs it in an isolated git worktree (patterns/isolated-worktree + scripts/workbench.py), checks it against explicit acceptance-gate criteria (standard + bugfix/feature/refactor/review/security presets, resolving to passed/passed_with_warnings/failed/pending/skipped), and only lands the diff on `accept` — whose accept_requirements checklist (worktree_exists/base_branch_recorded/diff_summary_generated) can't be bypassed even with --force. `/rig:rig board` gives a single dashboard of every active task — run several tasks at once via `/rig:queue go --provider rig` (each dispatched through the same isolation, so parallel headless processes never collide) and never lose track across terminals. Visual-verification screenshots (patterns/visual-artifacts) live under `.rig/` and are pruned by `workbench.py gc` (age-based) or immediately on `discard` — disposable evidence, not the deliverable. `/rig:rig stats` aggregates past runs and flags reviewers with zero rejects as possible rubber stamps. Also a LEGO-style harness composer: compose bricks (facets/patterns/steps/recipes) at invocation time into a task-specific agent harness. Domain-agnostic engine: dev-flow orchestration (review, implement, PR), pluggable packs — sales deal-review, a conversational mode (rig:talk), a goal-driven loop (rig:goal), existing-PR review (rig:pr), GitHub Issue/PR/CI workflows (rig:rig gh), a reviewer-detection-rate drill (rig:drill) scoring detection/severity/blocking/explanation accuracy, and a prose AI-smell remover (de-ai-smell) — plus a --validate doctor, a /rig:init scaffolder, generators for reviewer personas (/rig:persona) and LLM-wiki domain knowledge (/rig:knowledge), self-extension that authors new bricks/packs from a description and validates them (/rig:forge), a /rig:catalog cross-tier registry, and run-continuity that survives context compaction via a shipped PreCompact hook. Tiered (project/global) personas and a cross-linked knowledge wiki keep domain knowledge shared, not siloed. Claude Code native; no heavy DSL engine.

entry.title: mattpocock-skills
entry.content: mattpocock-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: ai-mentor
entry.content: Learn the Claude Code capabilities you didn't know existed. A discovery mentor that reads your setup, remembers what you already use, and teaches your highest-leverage gap — one demonstrated move at a time, grounded in your repo, never repeating itself.

entry.title: delegate-team
entry.content: Agentic engineering supersystem - install once, run /mavis-ship "<task>" or dt run "<task>" anywhere. Bundles the /mavis-ship orchestrator, multi-agent team framework, skill scaffolder, agent-kernel (memory + governance), and four companion frameworks (superpowers, Waza, unslop-preflight, autoresearch) on top of the original dt gateway CLI.

entry.title: soapbox-agent
entry.content: Soapbox core sustainability intelligence — RSRA, CRREM pathways, retrofit advisor, and report template engine. Skills, agents, and MCP tools for real estate sustainability teams.

entry.title: alp-river
entry.content: Multi-step agent refinement for Claude Code: a deterministic router composes the exact stages each task needs.

entry.title: tea-rags
entry.content: Data-driven code generation strategies powered by TeaRAGs git signals

entry.title: mehtab-skills
entry.content: Freelance business skills plus a model-routing expert team: Fiverr/Upwork selling, contracts, clients, agency ops, and a router that delegates tasks to haiku/sonnet/opus/fable specialist subagents (web dev, AI, DevOps, product, security, data, docs).

entry.title: review-buddy
entry.content: AI-assisted narrative code review for Claude Code — an agent reads your PR, writes a Prologue, and segments it into risk-rated Chapters you walk through in the browser.

entry.title: weekly-report
entry.content: Generate English weekly reports from Git/SVN commit history

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Universal agentic skill library for Claude Code with 1,254+ reusable skills across coding, security, design, product, and operations workflows.

entry.title: wire-preview

entry.title: andrej-karpathy-skills

entry.title: jira
entry.content: Comprehensive Jira integration with auto-detection of issue keys

entry.title: personal-corp-skills
entry.content: Personal Corp framework: run your business with AI agents through GitHub, department repos, Telegram, agent gateways, html-draft diagrams, and media/art-direction workflows

entry.title: m3
entry.content: Local-first persistent memory for Claude Code — 101 MCP tools, hybrid search (FTS5 + vector + MMR), bitemporal contradictions, GDPR primitives, chatlog auto-capture, multi-agent handoffs.

entry.title: eli5-gate
entry.content: Pre-implementation necessity gate for GitHub issues: plain-language intent ELI5, staleness/necessity verdict against post-filing history, and a plan-approval checkpoint before any code is written.

entry.title: fosmvvm-generators
entry.content: FOSMVVM architecture generators for ViewModels, Fields, DataModels, ServerRequests, Leaf Views, and ViewModel Tests

entry.title: oli-dev
entry.content: Conduz o ciclo de desenvolvimento OLI encadeando skills do superpowers com gates opinativos (worktree sempre, conductor sempre Opus, tier de modelo full/light nos subagentes despachados, pre-push obrigatório, finalize pós-merge). Depende do plugin superpowers.

entry.title: sessionmovie
entry.content: Turn a Claude Code session into a 45-60s rendered movie — /movie films the current session.

entry.title: lightningrod-python-sdk
entry.content: Lightningrod Python SDK — forecasting inference skills

entry.title: context-mode
entry.content: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entry.title: telegram
entry.content: Telegram channel for Claude Code — messaging bridge with built-in access control. Manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /telegram:access.

entry.title: agent-toolkit
entry.content: A collection of project-agnostic skills for common engineering tasks such as ticket refinement, planning, code reviews, agent memory hygiene, skill authoring, and more.
